qas.q: What is the difference between hazmat and dangerous goods?
qas.a: Both are Products or substance that are a risk to healthy safety and property and the environment. Hazmat applies to these product or substances when they are store and dangerous good applied when they are transported

qas.q: Which of these products are considered hazmat?
qas.a:
A cell phone contains a lithium-ion battery
A bottle of perfume

qas.q: Which of these hazard products are allowed in your FC?
qas.a:
A GPS unit (lithium batteries)
A subwoofer( magnetized materials)

qas.q: Which of these hazmat products warnings or labels are allowed in your FC?
You are receiving an shipment and come across a box of shaving cream what should you do?
You are showing items and come across an aerosol bottle of hairspray. What should you do?
You are picking an order and come across a box of perfume . What should you do?
We cannot control which hazmat products vendors sent to the FC and must be on the lookout for products that are not allowed
